Built for high-volume, multi-region operations. Handles complex procurement, global logistics, and compliance alongside your Shopify storefront.
Purpose-built for Shopify brands that manufacture products. Real-time production planning, raw material tracking, and shop floor visibility.
Modular and cost-effective. Start with inventory and accounting, then add CRM or manufacturing as your business grows.
Mid-market ERP with solid financial controls, warehouse management, and purchasing workflows. Less complex than S/4HANA.
Open-source ERP covering accounting, inventory, HR, and project management. No licensing fees. Fully customizable by your dev team.
The most widely deployed cloud ERP for Shopify Plus merchants. Financials, warehouse management, and CRM in one platform.
Cloud-native ERP with unlimited-user licensing. Scales with your team without adding per-seat costs as you grow.
Finance-first ERP built for CFOs. Multi-entity consolidation, revenue recognition, and audit-ready reporting connected to Shopify.
Built for manufacturers and distributors. Production management, quality control, and supply chain planning integrated with Shopify.

Book a Free Consultation How We Build Your Shopify ERP Integration Integration Strategy and Data Mapping We audit your ERP data structure and your Shopify store setup to map exactly which data needs to flow, in which direction, and at what frequency. No assumptions. No generic templates.

We build the integration layer, whether that is a pre-built connector, iPaaS configuration, or custom API middleware. Every field is mapped, every edge case is accounted for, and every sync is tested against real data before going live.
We run full QA across all data flows before your integration goes live. Post-launch, we monitor sync performance, handle errors, and iterate as your business and ERP requirements evolve.

Book a Free Consultation Advanced Integration Features We Configure Bi-Directional Real-Time Sync Data flows both ways between Shopify and your ERP, automatically. Orders created in Shopify appear in your ERP within seconds. Fulfillment updates in your ERP push back to Shopify immediately. No scheduled batch exports, no lag, no manual intervention.

We configure inventory sync across multiple Shopify locations and multiple ERP warehouse records. Each location stays accurate in real time so your fulfillment team always knows what is available and where.

Every ERP structures data differently from Shopify. We build custom field mappings that translate your ERP's data model into Shopify's requirements, including custom metafields, product variants, pricing tiers, and tax codes.

When a sync fails, your team knows about it immediately through automated alerts. We build error handling logic that logs failures, retries where appropriate, and notifies the right people so no order or inventory update falls through the cracks.
We connect your ERP to third-party logistics providers and warehouse management systems that sit between Shopify and your ERP, ensuring fulfillment data flows cleanly across all three systems.

For Shopify Plus B2B stores, we configure ERP sync that handles company accounts, buyer-specific pricing, net payment terms, purchase order data, and invoice generation as part of the integration layer.
Every order, inventory update, and customer record that previously required manual entry now moves automatically. Your team stops doing the work that software should be doing.
Real-time sync means your Shopify store always reflects your actual available stock. No more overselling, no more stockouts caused by data that is hours behind.
Orders flow from Shopify into your ERP and out to fulfillment without anyone touching them manually. Errors caused by manual entry drop immediately. Fulfillment speeds up.
Finance, operations, and your Shopify store all work from the same live data. Month-end reconciliation gets faster. Purchasing decisions get smarter. Reporting gets accurate.

Harvard University Getting Started With Us For Your ERP for Shopify Integration Looks Like This Ready to integrate? You know your ERP and your Shopify store need to be connected. Book a free consultation and we will scope the right integration approach for your systems, data volume, and budget.

Book a Free Consultation Not Sure Where to Start? Tell us which ERP you are running, how many orders you process per week, and what data you need to sync. We will give you an honest recommendation, even if the answer is "not yet."

Contact Us Now Frequently Asked Questions What ERP systems can you connect to Shopify? We connect Shopify to NetSuite, Microsoft Dynamics 365, SAP Business One, SAP S/4HANA, Acumatica, Odoo, Sage 100, Sage 300, Sage X3, Katana, Epicor, and most other ERP systems with an available API. If your ERP is not on this list, contact us and we will assess compatibility.

Most Shopify ERP integrations take four to eight weeks from discovery to go-live, depending on the complexity of your data model, the number of data flows required, and whether we are using a pre-built connector or building custom middleware. We provide a clear timeline with every quote before work begins.

Shopify ERP integration cost depends on the ERP system, the number of data flows, integration complexity, and whether a pre-built connector or custom build is required. Simple integrations using existing connectors are faster and lower cost. Complex custom builds for enterprise ERP systems are scoped individually. We provide fixed-price quotes with no hourly billing surprises. Contact us for a detailed estimate.
